name: opencode-crof-auth
description: CrofAI authentication provider plugin for OpenCode

scripts.build: bun run clean && bun build src/index.ts --outdir dist --target=bun --external @opencode-ai/plugin --external @opentui/core --external @opentui/solid --external solid-js && mkdir -p dist/scripts && bun build scripts/setup.ts --outdir dist/scripts --target=bun

author: byBackfish
